sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51749" key="ka/qerma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάθερμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n51749.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἕρματα</ref> </xr> (v. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἕρμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0719.tlg003.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:21:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
